name: blindtest-ai-worker
description: AI enrichment worker for BlindTest — runs on a powerful desktop, classifies tracks via LLM + audio analysis, writes results to PostgreSQL

scripts.run: node scripts/sync-pull.js && node src/index.js && node scripts/clean-genres.js && node scripts/deduplicate.js && node scripts/sync-push.js && node scripts/auto-curate.js --remote
scripts.pipeline: node scripts/fill-cache-from-charts.js && node src/index.js && node scripts/auto-curate.js
